name: Anastrozole Tablets
about: Anastrozole tablets are a medication used to treat breast cancer in women who have gone through menopause. The active ingredient in these tablets is Anastrozole. These tablets are available in the form of a tablet and have a normal fermentation smell. The tablets are manufactured in India and can be stored in a dry place. The shelf life of these tablets is 12-24 months. Anastrozole tablets work by decreasing the amount of estrogen in the body, which slows or stops the growth of breast cancer cells that require estrogen to grow. These tablets are typically taken once a day with or without food. It is essential to take these tablets as prescribed by your doctor.

faq.a: Anastrozole is used to treat breast cancer in women who have gone through menopause.

faq.q: What is the active ingredient in Anastrozole tablets?
faq.a: The active ingredient in Anastrozole tablets is Anastrozole.

faq.q: How should I take Anastrozole tablets?
faq.a: Anastrozole tablets are typically taken once a day with or without food. It is essential to take these tablets as prescribed by your doctor.

faq.q: What is the shelf life of Anastrozole tablets?
faq.a: The shelf life of Anastrozole tablets is 12-24 months.

faq.q: What are the storage instructions for Anastrozole tablets?
faq.a: Anastrozole tablets should be stored in a dry place.
